body:
Can enter invalid commands in schema ui

Num
number.int(min=1, min=2, max=3)

- error shown in schema editor

And can switch to Edit as Text

When editing as text, we can switch back to edit as schema, but If is a params issue then we should not be asked to convert to literal.

We need to distinguisth between a malformed or unknown command and a known command where the params are incorrect.

If it is a params syntax error but the command is valid then switching between editors should be allowed - generation/preview will trigger the normal error reporting.
title: Defect: switching from text to ui with params error should not conver to literal
